title: Elysium Spa Neroli & Sweet Orange Bath Bombs
features: CITRUS FRESH: Elysium Spa Neroli & Sweet Orange Bath Bombs, relax, unwind and enjoy the combined uplifting Neroli and calming Orange fragrance. Each reselable pack contains 3 fragranced bath bombs

BUBBLE FREE : Prefer the perfect scented, silky water to relax into? Elysium Spa Bath bombs are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, add the bath bomb, which will gently and release it's fragrance. Relax and enjoy.

READY TO USE: Elysium Spa Bath Bombs, ready to use, open the package, add the bath bomb to warm running bath water for a wonderfully soothing and relaxing bath. Re-seal pack after each bath bomb is removed to keep remaining bath bombs in the pack dry
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Elysium Spa Neroli & Sweet Orange Bath Bombs
